componentInstanceProperties.name: label
componentInstanceProperties.value: Most viewed pages on the website

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
This contact is associated with a company flagged as a competitor, which prevents access to a Prospace account. The contact's status will therefore be automatically set to 'Disabled'


If the Company is not/no longer considered a competitor, please update their information and Prospace accounts will become available for it's contacts.

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Prospace Alerts are not available if the contact has opted out of emails.


To reactivate Prospace Alerts, deselect the "Prospace Opt Out" toggle in the Preference Center and refresh the page.
